title: Business Development Executive (International Sales) | Automotive Sector
description:
• Basic up to S$4,500/month (commensurate with experience).

  • Near Clementi MRT

  • Monday – Friday | 8:30 AM – 6:00 PM.

  • International sales of automotive products including tyres, rims, and batteries.

    Join a global automotive distributor as a strategic Business Development Executive. In this role, you will bridge the gap between market data and international sales growth. We are looking for a corporate-oriented professional who excels in data analysis, professional paperwork, and high-level email correspondence. You will manage a balanced portfolio of servicing existing accounts while strategically hunting for new business opportunities across global markets.

Key Responsibilities:

  • Identify international business opportunities and develop effective sales and marketing strategies to drive growth.

  • Support overseas customers to achieve team targets and manage the full order fulfillment cycle to ensure customer satisfaction.

  • Use Excel to conduct product comparisons and analyze market trends to present compelling business cases to clients.

  • Maintain strong relationships with existing international clients while actively prospecting for new leads.

  • Handle comprehensive paperwork and follow up on sales activities in a primarily deskbound environment.

Requirements:

  • Diploma or Degree in Business Studies, Administration, or a related field.

  • Minimum 1 year in international sales and business development.

  • Competent in Microsoft Excel and PowerPoint for complex data analysis and professional presentations.

  • Strong business acumen, excellent verbal/written communication, and a "corporate-ready" professional image.

  • Comfortable with a deskbound role; overseas travel is only required when necessary.

Other Information:

  • No commission; performance bonus is based on company profitability and individual merit.

  • Local mobile reimbursement (up to S$65/month) and transport reimbursement.

  • Starting at 15 days Annual Leave (increases to 19 days with tenure).

  • Full medical claim at appointed GPs and dental claims up to S$250/year.

  • 3-month period with a clear notice structure.


Please indicate the following information in your resume:

  • Current & Expected salary.

  • Reason(s) for leaving.

  • Availability to commence work.

We regret only shortlisted candidates will be notified. All applications will be treated with the strictest confidence.

postedCompany.description:
Recruit Now Singapore Pte Ltd | EA No: 21C0845


We provide solutions to all recruitment needs as well as HR services for a range of industries in Singapore. Our clients varying from well-known and established corporations to up-and-coming start-ups, put their trust in our services to provide the most efficient and effective results for recruitment and HR services. Supporting the exponential growth of our clients is and always will be what we strive for. 


We have a team of well-equipped recruiters who are dedicated to placing job seekers with the best-suited companies. We make sure our recruiters at Recruit Now are well-educated on employment laws, job market and skillsets needed for respective industries to ensure a meticulous selection process in recruitment and safe employment. 


Take your first step in finding your career.
postedCompany.name: RECRUIT NOW SINGAPORE PTE. LTD.
